assertion_results.assertion: Step 8 Case A creates standard remediation tasks for the current stream (rhtpa-2.2) with standard labels ['ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123'] and 'Depend' link to TC-8020
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md lines 9-17: Case A upstream backport task created with labels: ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123"]. Line 74: Depend link to TC-8020 via jira.create_link(type: "Depend"). Lines 77-141: Downstream propagation subtask with same labels and Depend link. Both tasks are scoped to rhtpa-2.2.

assertion_results.assertion: Step 8 Case B detects that stream rhtpa-2.1 is also affected but has no CVE Jira — creates proactive preemptive remediation tasks (§1.60)
assertion_results.evidence: cross-stream.md line 39: 'No sibling Vulnerability issues found. No CVE Jira exists for stream rhtpa-2.1.' Lines 41-43: 'Since stream rhtpa-2.1 is affected but has no CVE Jira, Step 8 Case B creates proactive preemptive remediation tasks for that stream.' remediation.md lines 144-301: Case B section creates two preemptive tasks (upstream backport and downstream propagation) for rhtpa-2.1.

assertion_results.assertion: Preemptive tasks for stream rhtpa-2.1 include the 'security-preemptive' label alongside standard labels: ['ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123', 'security-preemptive']
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md line 160-161: Upstream preemptive task labels: ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123", "security-preemptive"]. Line 164 confirms the full label set. Lines 240-244: Downstream preemptive task has identical label set. cross-stream.md line 54: 'Full label set: ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123", "security-preemptive"]'.

assertion_results.assertion: Preemptive tasks are linked to the originating CVE Jira TC-8020 with 'Related' link type (not 'Depend') because the originating CVE belongs to a different stream
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md line 226: jira.create_link(inwardIssue: "TC-8020", outwardIssue: <preemptive-upstream-task-key>, type: "Related"). Line 228: 'Link type: Related (not Depend) because the originating CVE Jira TC-8020 belongs to stream rhtpa-2.2, not rhtpa-2.1.' Line 300: Downstream preemptive task also uses Related link to TC-8020. cross-stream.md lines 55-56 confirm the Related link type rationale.

assertion_results.assertion: Preemptive task descriptions include a preemptive remediation prefix noting TC-8020 (stream rhtpa-2.2) as the originating CVE
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md lines 182-186: Upstream preemptive task description starts with '> **Preemptive remediation**: This task was created proactively from cross-stream > impact analysis of TC-8020 (stream rhtpa-2.2). > No stream-specific CVE Jira exists yet for this stream.' Lines 260-264: Downstream preemptive task has identical prefix. cross-stream.md lines 58-63 confirm the prefix content.
